title: Sardine Stew
description: A hearty stew made with sardines, perfect for a cold winter evening. This dish is a twist on the classic American stew.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped sardines and cook until they start to flake apart.
Add the diced tomatoes, hot sauce, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
